environment.sha_verification_source: GitHub Actions API: GET /repos/apache/superset/actions/runs/29621220321 returns head_sha=67b8a00c68094744f290a738665702d4a7d58967, status=completed, conclusion=success. Job 88016507403 ('Sync PR to desired state') conclusion=success. PR label '🎪 67b8a00 🌐 44.249.137.165:8080' confirms deployment target.

test_cases.title: Pivot ratio totals and row subtotals are recomputed at their displayed granularity

given: Pivot Table on birth_names with rows gender then state
Ratio metric divides California names by all names
Grand totals and row subtotals enabled
when: Run the chart and expand both gender groups
then: Each gender subtotal equals the ratio recomputed from that gender's source rows
Grand total equals the ratio recomputed from all rows
Neither is the sum of displayed leaf percentages

test_cases.risk: Core SIP correctness claim and canonical defect

test_cases.title: Pivot distinct-count grand total does not double-count values shared across groups

given: Groups share values in the distinct-count column
then: Grand total equals the distinct count over the complete dataset
Grand total is not the sum of group-level distinct counts

test_cases.risk: Distinct totals cannot be reconstructed client-side

test_cases.title: Pivot ratio values are placed correctly across row and column subtotal intersections

given: Pivot has row dimensions and column dimensions
Row subtotals, column subtotals, and grand totals enabled
when: Run the chart and expand subtotal groups
then: Every row subtotal appears under its matching column
Every column subtotal appears beside its matching row
Corner grand total is the full-dataset ratio
No subtotal is duplicated, swapped, or omitted

test_cases.risk: New passthrough maps precomputed rollup levels into cells

test_cases.title: Additive Pivot Table sums remain unchanged

then: Each subtotal equals the sum of its visible children
Grand total equals the sum across leaf groups
Every expected total position renders

test_cases.risk: Additive metrics use a separate client-side fast path

test_cases.title: Table percentage metric is present and correct in the summary row

given: Regular Table has a Percentage metrics contribution column
then: Percentage column has a visible summary value
Summary reflects the complete result rather than only the visible page
Other summary metrics remain populated

test_cases.risk: Author instruction and linked defects report empty or zero values

test_cases.title: Saved Pivot Table ignores legacy aggregation setting without breaking

given: Saved Pivot has a legacy aggregateFunction value
It uses a non-additive metric and totals
when: Open in Explore, run, save, and reopen
then: Chart loads without error
Aggregation function control is absent
Totals follow metric definition, not legacy setting
Save and reopen succeeds

test_cases.risk: Removed UI control has a migration-free compatibility promise

test_cases.title: Disabled Pivot totals do not leave stray rollup rows or cells

given: All subtotals and grand totals disabled
then: Only leaf values display
No Total labels, blank total bands, or duplicate leaves appear

test_cases.risk: Query pruning should request only displayed levels

test_cases.title: Transposed Pivot Table keeps non-additive totals on the correct axes

given: Pivot has row and column dimensions
then: Dimensions appear on transposed axes
Totals remain attached to corresponding transposed groups
Grand total remains correct

test_cases.risk: Query builder and transform both handle display-oriented grouping
